question: Tell me one thing you've been most grateful for lately.
What's something I do better at home vs. something you do better?
When is the most peaceful moment in our home?
Is there something we always disagree on when grocery shopping?
What's the most recent food you ate behind my back?
What's the one thing always in our fridge that belongs to your spouse?
What's the phrase your spouse says the most these days?
Can you describe your spouse's after-work routine in order?
What's the delivery food we order the most as a couple?
When do you feel most at ease being together?
What does your spouse unconsciously do when stressed?
What's the AC/heater temperature battle in our house like?
What's the first thing your spouse does on a weekend morning?
Does your spouse have a quirky habit they always do while cooking?
Who controls the TV remote in our house?
How do you two divide up tasks when cleaning together?
What app do you think your spouse uses most on their phone?
Who mainly handles the recycling at home? Be honest!
What does your spouse unconsciously do when they're in a good mood?
Has living together given you any of your spouse's habits?
When you're both on your phones and laughing at the same time, what are you usually looking at?
What does your spouse always do right before falling asleep?
What's the territory split in our bed like?
What's your spouse's behavior pattern when they're upset?
What's the most-bought appliance or item since getting married?
Do we call each other different things depending on the situation?
Is there a signal that tells you how your spouse is feeling when they get home from work?
Is there something of your spouse's you secretly want to throw away?
Is there something that bothers you at home that your spouse doesn't care about at all?
What's your spouse's morning alarm style? Is it different from yours?
What's the most surprising habit of your spouse you discovered after moving in together?
What's the one everyday preference you two are most in sync on?
Is there a look or behavior your spouse has when they're tired?
Is there a new hobby your spouse has been into lately?
What's the local shop we go to together most often?
What does your spouse nag you about the most?
Which one of you enjoys opening packages more?
What's your spouse like when they have a cold? Quietly suffering or overdramatic?
What's the order of our morning routine as a couple?
Do we have any inside words or nicknames that developed from living together?
What was your first impression of your spouse before you got married?
What was really going through your mind when you got (or gave) the proposal?
What's the most memorable scene from your wedding day?
Was there an awkward moment early in your marriage?
Do you remember your first big fight? What did you learn from it?
What was the hardest part of planning the wedding?
Was there a funny story when you first decorated the house together?
What was the first holiday after getting married like?
When did your spouse make you laugh the hardest?
Have you two cried together? What was going on?
What was the first piece of furniture or item you got together after marrying?
What's the most memorable moment from a trip you've taken together?
Was there a story from when you first met your spouse's family?
What's the funniest misunderstanding or mix-up in your married life?
Which anniversary stands out as the most special?
Was there a funny episode from cooking together?
Is there a place that holds special memories just for the two of you? What's it like?
Was there a night you spent alone after getting married? How was it?
Is there your own way of making up after a fight?
Have you surprised your spouse or has your spouse surprised you with something special?
What unexpected talent of your spouse surprised you most after living together?
When did you think 'I'm so glad I married this person'?
How has the way you see your spouse changed from when you were dating to now?
When was the most nerve-wracking moment of your married life?
Have you two tried something together and failed? What happened?
Have you ever been caught doing something behind your spouse's back?
What's the most touching thing your spouse has done for you?
What's the biggest difference between the married life you imagined before and real life?
What did you do for your spouse when they were struggling that actually helped?
How did it feel when your spouse first called you 'honey' or 'babe'?
How did your couple traditions or routines come about?
Did your friendships change after getting married?
Is there a hobby or activity you started because of your spouse?
Is there a habit of your spouse's that bothered you at first but now seems endearing?
What was the most unexpected moment in your married life?
When did you first feel like it was truly 'our home'?
What was the first habit to change after getting married?
Is there a project or goal you two completed together?
What's the thing you feel most proud of achieving together as a couple?
When was the most peaceful moment in your married life?
Is there something you haven't properly expressed gratitude to your spouse for yet?
What's an area where you feel you're still falling short as a spouse?
Is there something you feel sorry about to your spouse but haven't said yet?
What's the thing you're tolerating the most in your married life?
Is there something you hope your spouse never changes?
What's the hardest topic to be honest with your spouse about?
Have you ever felt like you and your spouse show love differently?
Is there something you might have said or done that hurt your spouse without realizing it?
What do you think your spouse wants from you? Are you giving them that?
Is there something you've wanted to say to your spouse but missed the timing?
What's something in your marriage you feel you must never give up on?
Have you felt like you two talk less these days? Why do you think that is?
Is there something in your married life you're carrying alone?
What's the warmest moment of love you've received from your spouse?
Do you think you express enough gratitude in your relationship?
What can you do to better understand your spouse?
When did you feel the biggest difference in values in your married life?
Have you ever worried that you're asking too much of your spouse?
What do you think you two are doing well as a couple lately?
Is there something about how you handle conflict with your spouse that you want to improve?
How do you think you've changed as a person since getting married?
What do you think your spouse is struggling with lately?
Do you two have unspoken rules in your relationship? Are they being kept?
Have you ever felt lonely in your marriage?
Have you ever honestly talked with your spouse about physical affection and how you show love?

When do you feel your spouse understands you best?
What do you think we need to be happier as a couple?
Do you feel like you're cheering on your spouse's dreams and goals enough?
Is there advice you'd give your pre-married self?
How do you think your spouse sees themselves? Is there anything that worries you?
What can you concretely do to be more attentive to each other?
Are you and your spouse able to talk honestly about money and household matters?
If you could tell your spouse 'I've become this way because of you,' what would you say?
In your marriage, do you tend to give in first, or does your spouse?
What aspect of your spouse do you genuinely admire?
How do you feel about having 'alone time' within a marriage?
What's the area where you feel you've grown the most in your marriage?
What's the most memorable thing your spouse has ever said to you?

What's one thing you definitely want to do together with your spouse someday?
Is there something you want to do together after retirement?
What's one bucket list item you want to take on together?
Is there one promise you hope we always keep as a couple?
Is there a place you'd want to live in your later years? What kind of place?
Is there something you want to learn together with your spouse?
What's your definition of happiness as a couple?
If you started a new hobby with your spouse right now, what would you want to do?
Is there a dream of your spouse's that you hope comes true?
What can we start doing now to get closer as a couple?

If you were to learn a new language together, which would you choose?

Is there a destination you'd want us to go to regularly in the future?
Is there a goal you want to achieve together in your married life?

Is there a special event you'd love to do on your wedding anniversary someday?
Is there something you definitely want to add to our home?
How do you feel about growing old together with your spouse?

Is there a habit in our conversations as a couple that you want to improve?
Is there a daily routine you'd want to do with your spouse when you're old?

Is there something in your married life you want to move forward to?
Is there a tradition or ritual you want to build together going forward?
Is there a way you'd like to contribute to others or society together?

How do you want to change the way you love your spouse?

Is there something you feel you two could accomplish together no matter when?
What do you most want to hold onto in your relationship going forward?
What do you imagine our weekend routine will look like 20 years from now?
Is there a surprise you really want to give your spouse in the future?
Is there something you want to make sure your spouse knows through this conversation today?
Is there any content — a book, show, anything — you'd want to enjoy together?
Do you want to do some kind of volunteer or charity work together?
What can we each do to be more honest with each other going forward?
Is there a healthy habit you'd like to start together right now?
